2606.23759.title: VeriPilot: An LLM-Powered Verilog Debugging Framework
2606.23759.paper_summary: Verilog debugging remains one of the most time-consuming stages in digital circuit design. Recent advances in Large Language Models (LLMs) have enabled automated debugging; however, most existing approaches rely solely on test outputs and compiler feedback in an end-to-end manner, limiting their effectiveness on complex bugs. A key challenge is that the root cause of an error may be far removed from its observable outputs, making it difficult for LLMs to trace long dependency chains in code. This challenge is further exacerbated in large codebases, where long context lengths hinder efficient reasoning. To address these limitations, we propose VeriPilot, an LLM-powered debugging framework that leverages golden reference models to enable fine-grained bug localization and repair. VeriPilot goes beyond output-level comparison by aligning internal variable semantics between the Verilog design and its corresponding golden model through LLM-based analysis. It then performs step-by-step signal tracing using Control-Data-Flow Graphs (CDFGs) derived from static analysis, identifying a minimal set of suspicious code regions along with their correct counterparts from the golden model. These structured insights are subsequently provided to the LLM to guide reasoning and automated code repair. Experimental results on the Comprehensive Verilog Design Problems (CVDP) benchmark from NVIDIA demonstrate that VeriPilot improves the repair success rate of GPT-4o from 54.3\% to 85.71\%, significantly enhancing both bug localization accuracy and repair effectiveness for complex Verilog designs. The source code and benchmark are publicly available at Github https://github.com/YihanWn/VeriPilot.git.
2606.23759.paper_summary_zh: Verilog 調試仍然是數位電路設計中最耗時的階段之一。最近在大型語言模型 (LLMs) 的進展使得自動化調試成為可能；然而，大多數現有的方法僅依賴測試輸出和編譯器反饋，以端到端的方式進行，這限制了它們在複雜錯誤上的有效性。一個主要挑戰是錯誤的根本原因可能與其可觀察的輸出相距甚遠，這使得 LLMs 難以追蹤代碼中的長依賴鏈。這一挑戰在大型代碼庫中進一步加劇，因為長上下文長度妨礙了有效推理。為了解決這些限制，我們提出了 VeriPilot，一個由 LLM 驅動的調試框架，利用黃金參考模型來實現細粒度的錯誤定位和修復。VeriPilot 超越了輸出級別的比較，通過基於 LLM 的分析對 Verilog 設計及其相應的黃金模型之間的內部變量語義進行對齊。然後，它使用從靜態分析中派生的控制數據流圖 (CDFGs) 進行逐步信號追蹤，識別出一組最小的可疑代碼區域及其來自黃金模型的正確對應部分。這些結構化的見解隨後提供給 LLM，以指導推理和自動代碼修復。對 NVIDIA 的綜合 Verilog 設計問題 (CVDP) 基準的實驗結果顯示，VeriPilot 將 GPT-4o 的修復成功率從 54.3\% 提高到 85.71\%，顯著提升了複雜 Verilog 設計的錯誤定位準確性和修復有效性。源代碼和基準可在 GitHub 上公開獲得 https://github.com/YihanWn/VeriPilot.git。
2606.23759.author: Yihan Wang et.al.
2606.23759.authors: Yihan Wang, Cheng Liu, Jiazheng Zhang, Lei Zhang, Long Cheng, Xiaowei Li, Huawei Li
